case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. MONEE SHAIDAIL JIMMERSON

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $677.54 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT JIMMERSON, MONEE SHAIDAIL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-13-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-13-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC, REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MONEE SHAIDAL JIMMERSON IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 - SERVED FEB-06-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JIMMERSON, MONEE SHAIDAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JIMMERSON, MONEE SHAIDAIL $677.54 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $757.54 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
RETURN MAIL - NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT,UNABLE TO FORWARD.
